executiveSummary.headline: Your site scores 75/100 — there are meaningful improvements that could boost performance and conversions.
executiveSummary.callToAction: The issues identified below are actionable improvements that can increase search rankings, improve user experience, and drive more conversions. Our team can resolve these efficiently.

findings.message: 1 console error(s) detected — may indicate broken functionality.
No clear call-to-action buttons detected — missed conversion opportunity.

opportunities: Implement responsive CSS breakpoints for mobile devices (375px viewport).
Add prominent CTA buttons to drive user engagement and conversions.
